name: Guacamole Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mash the avocado until chunky.
2. Add lemon juice, seasoned salt, hot pepper sauce, and chopped tomato. Mix well.
3. In another bowl, beat the eggs with water, salt, and pepper until combined.
4. Heat a nonstick skillet or omelet pan over medium heat.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the heated pan, tiling it gently while shaking the pan to evenly distribute the liquid.
6. Once the edges begin to set (about 2-3 seconds), gently fold the omelet in half using a broad spatula.
7. Spoon the avocado mixture over one-half of the omelet.
8. Fold the other side over and continue cooking for another 30 seconds, or until the eggs are fully set.
(C) 1992 The Los Angeles Times
